revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=Muharram|2=Safar|3=Rabi' al-Awwal|4=Rabi' al-Thani|5=Jumada al-Awwal|6=Jumada al-Thani|7=Rajab|8=Sha'ban|9=Ramadan|10=Shawwal|11=Dhu al-Qadah|12=Dhu al-Hijjah|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=Mutsuki|2=Kisaragi|3=Yayoi|4=Uzuki|5=Satsuki|6=Minazuki|7=Fumizuki|8=Hazuki|9=Nagatsuki|10=Kannazuki|11=Shimotsuki|12=Shiwasu|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=Mutsuki|2=Kisaragi|3=Yayoi|4=Uzuki|5=Satsuki|6=Minazuki|7=Fumizuki|8=Hazuki|9=Nagatsuki|10=Kannazuki|11=Shimotsuki|12=Shiwasu|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
